text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe... Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, yup, right as rain! No problems here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about the race... Sei and King really were strong,
huh? Even stronger than they were at the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Down the stretch, I was so sure I could catch up—so sure I could pass
them. I could tell they were already spent.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But when I tried, it's like the harder I ran, the farther away they got...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
From what I saw, you did everything right strategy-wise. I don't think
this was a matter of skill or lack thereof.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Instead, it felt more like... drive. It's like their running—especially
Seiun Sky's—had another side to it. One you can't describe with
words.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Another side to it...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If you can't see the difference there, I think I've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Satsuki Sho... is mine for the taking.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Is something wrong, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Sei and I were talking before the race. She said our reasons
for running were similar, but definitely not the same.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that if I couldn't tell the difference, the race was as good as
hers...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, Suzuka... You run because you want to see the scenery from the
front, correct?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I long for the scenery I saw when I was little...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The rush I felt back then still lingers within me. That's why I run—to
feel that rush once more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But what does that have to do with your race?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, nothing! I just needed a reminder, that's all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (In other words... Suzuka runs because she wants something.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I'm running today for me. That's where we differ.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Sei and Suzuka are running for themselves...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(My dream is to be the best in Japan... but I inherited that dream from
my moms.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (What about me? Why do I run?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Spe seems to be taking this loss quite hard.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's strange. She moved on so quickly after her last loss.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's strange. She moved on so quickly after her last loss.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose it makes sense. Her hopes of being a Triple Crown
champion were dashed right out the gate...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose it makes sense. Her hopes of being a Triple Crown
champion were dashed right out the gate...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't... think that's the problem.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Oh? Then what is?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can't put it into exact words, but I think she's more disappointed in
herself than the race results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My brow furrows. If not her loss, what else could get Special Week so
down? She's never let anything distract her from her dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever it is, for now, all I can do is be there for her.
Hopefully, she'll be back to chasing her dreams again in no time.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
No doubt I'll be asking for help from you and the team. I hope you're
ready.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
No doubt I'll be asking for help from you and the team. I hope you're
ready.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Of course. Anytime.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... And, goooal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That was a full 2,400 meters, the same distance as the Derby. You've
never run a race that long, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you know, the Derby is a lot bigger than just 2,400 meters. If you
add in the dreams and passion—all the stories not yet told... it's so
much... bigger than us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Dreams, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Tickezo? You started running because of your dream to win the
Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yup! That was my dream from the time I was little!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's when I saw the Derby for the first time, and it was love at first sight! I just had to win it for myself!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And then, you made your dream come true...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and you know, something tells me that the strength of that
dream is what got me the win.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
A dream all my own... Something I thought about day and night. I
really think that drive to win is what helped me train as hard as I did.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Now if only I could do the same for schoolwork! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A dream all your own...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I intend to claim victory after victory and prove I am indeed first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I'm running today for me. The Satsuki Sho... is mine for the taking.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...It's amazing how you, McQueen, and Suzuka all have your own
dreams to chase after.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I mean, aren't you doing the same? You wanna be the best racer
in Japan, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah, but... it's a little different...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Becoming the best racer in Japan is something I promised my mom...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Sure, I always thought that was my dream too, but now it feels...
different somehow.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Their dreams are their own, something they decided for themselves,
while I... Do I even know why I run?)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Aw geez, I didn't think it would mess with her this much...
